_comment: Optional pre-seed. Leave "accounts" empty to start with the in-app "Add your first account" flow. Each account gets a fully isolated login session (its own cookies/storage) keyed by `id`. `service` is one of m365|outlook|gmail|custom (informational); `url` is what loads. `color` drives the rail avatar. A user-editable copy is written to the app's userData dir on first run, and that copy wins thereafter. Examples (commented form below):
